goal: Compare actual reward distribution to exact rational entitlement under low-decimal and small-reward conditions.
setup_requirements: multiple holders with different balances and exit times
minimal_state: total reward amount small relative to holder count or token decimals
attacker_actions: compare every user actual claim to exact entitlement
assertions: loss is bounded to documented dust or remainder is fairly preserved
early exit does not forfeit material accrued reward
common_failures: checking aggregate distribution but not per-user fairness
notes: Derived from existing normalized Code4rena case reports and intended as a reusable validation scaffold, not a protocol-specific PoC.
